title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ORION NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY BALAGTAS, MUNICIPALITY OF ORION, PROVINCE OF BATAAN TO JUSTICE EMILIO ANGELES GANCAYCO MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
109 OG No. 5, 489 (February 4, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10280, November 15, 2012 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ORION NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY BALAGTAS, MUNICIPALITY OF ORION, PROVINCE OF BATAAN TO JUSTICE EMILIO ANGELES GANCAYCO MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Renaming of a National High School.

â The name of Orion National High School in Barangay Balagtas, Municipality of Orion, Province of Bataan is hereby changed to Justice Emilio Angeles Gancayco Memorial High School.

SEC. 2.

Location of the Main Campus.

â The main campus of the Justice Emilio Angeles Gancayco Memorial High School shall remain in its present location in Barangay Balagtas, Municipality of Orion, Province of Bataan.

SBC. 3.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on October 4, 2010 and July 24, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

NOV 15 2012

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
